features.name: packed struct assignment to nonexistent member
features.description: Code should include a packed struct with a single logic member and an assign statement that writes to a non-existent struct member

features.name: nested packed struct assignment to nonexistent member
features.description: Code should include a nested packed struct and an assign statement that writes to a non-existent member at the inner struct level

features.name: generate for loop with out-of-range index on packed array lhs
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop with a genvar that iterates beyond the bounds of a packed array on the left-hand side of an assign

features.name: generate for loop with out-of-range index on packed array rhs
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop with a genvar that iterates beyond the bounds of a packed array on the right-hand side of an assign
